race.comment: It's hard to knock the form of SILENT CALL (2) this campaign who has two wins and four placings from six outings and is racing very consistently of late. Has only missed a drum once in five attempts over this mile journey and should be right there when the whips are cracking. DIVINE SOURCE (7) has won two of her past three with Thornton being in the saddle for both victories. Is usually thereabouts and has to be included in calculations. FASHIONABLE (9) strips fitter second-up from the break and will find this easier than what she's been facing down south. Has the ability to find the winners' list. HE'SGOTTHESAY (6) returned in fine fashion with a strong Ipswich victory and can go right on with the job now. The well-related WILD GYPSY (4) (half to G1 winner Wild Ruler) rounds out the selections.
